message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in inferrer.zig, signature.zig, try_except.zig

Add missing handlers for orelse_body in for_stmt/while_stmt,
and add try_stmt/with_stmt/match_stmt handlers to multiple
AST traversal functions:

inferrer.zig:
- collectConstructorArgs: add orelse_body, try_stmt, with_stmt, match_stmt
- findReturnTypeInBody: add orelse_body, try_stmt.else_body/finalbody, with_stmt

signature.zig:
- checkStmtForBigIntMethodCall: add orelse_body, while_stmt, try_stmt handlers, match_stmt
- returnsLambda: add orelse_body, try_stmt, with_stmt
- getReturnedNestedFuncName: add orelse_body, try_stmt, with_stmt
- hasReturnStatement: add orelse_body, try_stmt, with_stmt
- hasReturnWithValue: add orelse_body, with_stmt
- hasYieldStatement: add orelse_body, try_stmt.else_body/finalbody, match_stmt
- collectLocalClassDefinitions: add orelse_body, with_stmt, match_stmt

try_except.zig:
- findLocallyDeclaredVars: add orelse_body, try_stmt, with_stmt, match_stmt
- containsRaise: add orelse_body, with_stmt, match_stmt
- collectAssignedVarsRecursive: add orelse_body, try_stmt, with_stmt, match_stmt
